extensions.name: Acme Loyalty Segment
extensions.description: Pipe-delimited overlay (LOYALTY=...|INSTALLMENT=...). Promote to 48.1, 48.2, ... once the segment layout is frozen.

extensions.name: ICC System Related Data
extensions.description: EMV BER-TLV. Edited per tag; unknown tags are preserved for round-trip safety.

extensions.name: Acme Order Context
extensions.description: Private order metadata (ORDERID=...|CHANNEL=...). Model as 62.1, 62.2 once the partner documents the layout.

extensions.name: Acme Settlement Trace
extensions.description: Acquirer settlement trace blob. Keep opaque until the partner schema is stable across message classes.

extensions.name: Switch Private (Nested Bitmap)
extensions.description: Many switches nest a secondary bitmap / subelements here. Model separately from flat field parsing.
